testsuite.name: com.catfact.app.core.database.repository.CatFactRepositoryImplTest

testcase.name: observeFacts maps entities to domain models
getFactById returns null when not found
getFactById returns mapped domain model when found
updateNote calls dao with note and synced status
refreshFacts reports hasMorePages when not on last page
refreshFacts page 1 generates deterministic UUID from fact content
fetchRandomFact calls api and inserts into dao
toggleBookmark calls dao with inverted bookmark
searchFacts delegates to dao and maps results

testsuite.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/oudaykhaled/.gradle/caches/modules-2/files-2.1/net.bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.14.6/46e2545d7a97b6ccb195621650c5957279eb4812/byte-buddy-agent-1.14.6.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
